message:
test: improve test infrastructure and fix test hygiene

Test infrastructure improvements:

tests/common/mod.rs:
- Add shared test utilities for runtime initialization
- Standardize test setup across conformance tests
- Add helpers for async test execution

tests/channel_conformance.rs:
- Update to use common test utilities
- Fix import organization
- Improve test clarity

src/http/h1/stream.rs:
- Minor test adjustments for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
